---
title: "Week 10 — Spring Break (No Class)"
author: "STAT 251 Section 03"
output:
  html_document: default
  #pdf_document: default
always_allow_html: true
header-includes:
  \usepackage{float}
  \usepackage{tikz}

---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# NO CLASS - Spring Break
